data.title: Remove MCP guide and create @playwright/cli guide with command reference
data.description:
## Description
Remove plugins/dso/docs/PLAYWRIGHT-MCP-GUIDE.md and create plugins/dso/docs/PLAYWRIGHT-CLI-GUIDE.md documenting:
1. Full set of @playwright/cli commands used across migrated skills with example Bash invocations
2. Disk-based output patterns (how results are read back)
3. Command selection reference (snapshot vs screenshot vs run-code)
4. Session naming conventions (-s=<prefix>-<worktree>-<timestamp>)
5. Pre-flight checks and output validation patterns
6. CI environment considerations (--no-sandbox, browser install)

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/docs/PLAYWRIGHT-MCP-GUIDE.md (REMOVE)
- plugins/dso/docs/PLAYWRIGHT-CLI-GUIDE.md (CREATE)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] MCP guide removed
  Verify: ! test -f plugins/dso/docs/PLAYWRIGHT-MCP-GUIDE.md
- [ ] CLI guide exists
  Verify: test -f plugins/dso/docs/PLAYWRIGHT-CLI-GUIDE.md
- [ ] Guide contains command reference section
  Verify: grep -qi "command.*reference\|commands" plugins/dso/docs/PLAYWRIGHT-CLI-GUIDE.md
- [ ] Guide contains session naming section
  Verify: grep -qi "session.*nam" plugins/dso/docs/PLAYWRIGHT-CLI-GUIDE.md
- [ ] Guide contains pre-flight section
  Verify: grep -qi "pre-flight\|availability" plugins/dso/docs/PLAYWRIGHT-CLI-GUIDE.md
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
